title: Spanish Vegan Tortilla
description: A vegan twist on the classic Spanish omelette. This recipe replaces eggs with a nourishing mixture of garlicky goodness.
instructions: 2. In a blender or food processor, combine 4 cloves of garlic, 1/2 cup of nutritional yeast, and 1/4 cup of lemon juice. Blend until smooth.
3. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
4. Add the blended garlicky mixture and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Add the diced Spanish tortilla and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the mixture is set and lightly browned.
7. Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with salt to taste.
8. Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve warm.
